title: Optimized+
description: This modpack aims to enhance Minecraft's optimization and overall performance.
body:
The Optimize+ modpack is designed to deliver top-tier performance by integrating the best optimization mods available, carefully configured for maximum efficiency. Extensive research ensures it often surpasses other optimization solutions in benchmarks

Optimize+ prioritizes compatibility and simplicity, meaning it includes minimal quality-of-life or visual enhancements by default. Users are encouraged to add any non-optimization mods themselves.

This focus on simplicity enables quick updates to new Minecraft versions, often within hours or minutes, and sometimes even includes versions for snapshots. The modpack swiftly integrates updates with the latest performance improvements, ensuring it remains relevant and efficient.
